findingDefinitions.summary: The README has no recognizable guarantees, requirements, failure, or limitation section.
findingDefinitions.correction: State defaults, prerequisites, corrective failures, and unsupported guarantees proportionate to the package role.

findingDefinitions.summary: The README does not show the package-specific install or reference expression.
findingDefinitions.correction: Add the shortest supported dotnet add/tool/template installation command and state any current publication boundary.

findingDefinitions.summary: The README has no recognizable meaningful-use or behavior section.
findingDefinitions.correction: Show the smallest honest result and explain what referencing the package makes available.

findingDefinitions.summary: The package falls back to the framework root README.
findingDefinitions.correction: Add a package-owned README that explains this reference intent and its smallest meaningful result.

findingDefinitions.summary: The README does not use the exact package ID as its primary title.
findingDefinitions.correction: Use the exact package ID as the primary title so the NuGet page and source companion identify the same product.

findingDefinitions.summary: No package-owned technical companion describes runtime or build ownership.
findingDefinitions.correction: Add TECHNICAL.md when this package owns non-trivial activation, lifecycle, provider, projection, or build behavior; otherwise confirm during R11 review that the README contains the complete contract.

findingDefinitions.summary: The package description may be too terse to explain its distinct reference intent.
findingDefinitions.correction: Describe what capability appears, for whom, and the important boundary without repeating framework-wide marketing.

packages.description: Tested Koan foundation bundle: core runtime, Entity data, local Communication, and the JSON connector.
Koan AI semantic client, capability-aware routing, provider composition, source health, and startup inspection.
Entity-aware autonomous agents for Koan AI: auto-generated tools from Entity<T> with ReAct reasoning.
HuggingFace Hub connector for Koan AI: search, metadata, and download via adapter capabilities.
LM Studio provider for Koan AI (chat, streaming, embeddings) with auto-discovery.
Ollama provider for Koan AI (chat, streaming, embeddings) with Dev auto-discovery.

In-process embedding generation for Koan via ONNX Runtime. Runs a local sentence-embedding model (e.g. all-MiniLM-L6-v2) with a WordPiece tokenizer entirely in-process — no model server, no network. The embeddings rung of the single-binary tier.
Inert Koan AI contracts for provider adapters, routing, model selection, prompts, and multimodal request and result shapes.
Dependency-free identities and result vocabulary shared across Koan-compatible model, dataset, compute, job, evaluation, and lineage workflows.
Model evaluation, quality gates, regression detection, and drift monitoring for Koan AI.
Centralized model lifecycle for Koan AI: pull, convert, deploy, version, and manage models across runtimes.
Typed, immutable chain composition for Koan AI: RAG, branching, structured output, and streaming.
Optional Entity-backed catalog for storing and resolving versioned Koan AI prompts.
Human-in-the-loop review queues for Koan AI: approve, reject, edit, and label AI outputs to close the feedback loop.
Provider-neutral HTTP projection for Koan AI chat, embeddings, model inventory, and capability inspection.
Tested Koan application bundle: the Koan foundation plus controller-based ASP.NET Core integration.
Koan Cache: transparent Entity caching, policy and topology negotiation, bounded explicit eviction, coherence, health, and inspection.
Shared cache contracts for the Koan framework: policies, builders, serializers, and capability descriptors.
Redis-backed Remote Cache and layered every-node invalidation, using Koan's shared Redis backend without activating Data.
SQLite-backed persistent L1 cache store for Koan.Cache. Provides on-disk cache persistence with tag indexing and TTL eviction. Preempts the default Memory store by ProviderPriority.
Functional Koan Canon runtime with automatic model and pipeline composition.
Generated ASP.NET Core and inspection surfaces for discovered Koan Canon models.
Local-first AES-GCM field-at-rest protection for writable string Entity properties declared with Koan classification attributes.
Inert key-custody contracts for Koan field-at-rest classification.
Koan Communication: Entity-first local Events and Transport with typed handlers, isolated snapshots, context carriage, and bounded acceptance.
RabbitMQ Transport provider for Koan Communication with typed receiver groups and confirmed publication.
Composition and runtime substrate for Koan modules: lifecycle, context, provider catalogs, readiness, discovery, facts, and build provenance.
Provider-neutral Koan data contracts for Entity identity, repositories, structured queries, capabilities, and canonical operations.
Entity-aware AI operations for Koan: EntityAi.Embed/Chat/Ocr, [Embedding] convention defaults, [MediaAnalysis] auto-processing pipeline, and cross-modal search via the MediaAnalysisEmbeddingBridge.
Comprehensive backup and restore system for Koan Framework applications with streaming, compression, and multi-provider support.
CockroachDB provider for Koan relational data: a thin pg-wire delta over the Postgres connector (Npgsql + Dapper) with guardrails and governance.
Couchbase data provider for Koan: options binding and repository integration for document databases.
Elasticsearch vector adapter for Koan: index provisioning, kNN search, metadata filtering and health checks via the Elasticsearch REST API.
In-memory data provider for Koan: thread-safe repository for testing, development, and ephemeral storage scenarios.
Zero-configuration JSON persistence for small Koan applications, tests, and local development.
MongoDB data provider for Koan: options binding and repository integration for document databases.
OpenSearch vector adapter for Koan: index provisioning, kNN search, metadata filtering and health checks via the OpenSearch REST API.
PostgreSQL provider for Koan relational data: Dapper-based SQL integration with guardrails and governance.
Redis-backed key/value Entity persistence for Koan with explicit caller paging, source routing, shared connection pooling, and participation-aware health.
Durable embedded SQLite provider for Koan Entity data with zero-config local storage, schema management, queries, and bounded paging.
SQL Server provider for Koan relational data with JSON-projection pushdowns, guardrails, and governance.
Entity data runtime for Koan: provider election, routing, lifecycle, queries, paging, relationships, and canonical operations.
Shared schema governance, SQL translation, and command mechanics for Koan relational Data providers.
Inert relational schema, dialect, and DDL contracts for Koan Data providers.
Shared Npgsql repository mechanics for PostgreSQL-wire Koan Data providers.

Shared core for Koan search-engine vector connectors (Elasticsearch / OpenSearch, both built on Apache Lucene): the shared SearchEngineVectorRepository behind a 3-member ISearchEngineDialect seam, plus the single source of truth for translating the unified Filter AST into the search-engine query DSL.

Soft-delete for Koan (ARCH-0101 §4): the canonical operation-semantics-override reference module. [SoftDelete] opts an entity in; Delete sets an invisible __deleted field instead of physically removing the row, reads hide deleted rows, and .HardDelete()/.Restore()/.WithDeleted() are the escape verbs — all as registered contributors to the Koan.Data.Core storage pipeline (DATA-0105/0106/ARCH-0101) under Reference = Intent. The data core stays axis-agnostic.
Entity-first Koan vector runtime: provider election, memoized repository resolution, isolation-aware naming, querying, health participation, and facades.
Provider-neutral Koan vector contracts for search repositories, adapter factories, schemas, queries, matches, capabilities, and export shapes.

In-process, in-memory vector adapter for Koan: brute-force cosine k-NN over System.Numerics.Tensors (SIMD). The zero-infrastructure vector floor for single-binary deployments and the cross-adapter convergence oracle. Pure managed, no native dependencies, NativeAOT-friendly.
Milvus vector provider for Koan: entity-first KNN search, metadata-filter pushdown, bulk operations, and collection management over REST.
Qdrant vector provider for Koan: entity-first KNN search, payload filtering, bulk operations, export, and visibility-aware writes over REST.

Durable in-process vector adapter for Koan over sqlite-vec (asg017 vec0 v0.1.9) as a loadable SQLite extension. It can share SQLite's local database while k-NN runs in-process with no server. Native vec0 binaries for win-x64/linux-x64/linux-arm64 ship embedded and extract on first use.
Weaviate vector provider for Koan: entity-first KNN and hybrid search, GraphQL filter pushdown, continuation, export, and schema management.

SEC-0007 — the durable person (Identity) and the sign-in → identity reconciliation seam. Implements Koan.Web.Auth's IUserStore / IExternalIdentityStore with Entity<>-backed durable stores, upserts an Identity from claims on every sign-in, and gives Membership.IdentityId a real backing entity. Reference = Intent.
Compose durable Identity with Tenancy: active-membership request scoping, tenant-role projection, effective-access facts, and integrity-checked lifecycle receipts by reference plus AddKoan().
Reference-activated authenticated HTTP management for Koan.Identity: subject-scoped self-service, role-gated operator lifecycle and access APIs, and dual-control impersonation.

Koan Jobs: a durable, edge+level-triggered job orchestrator. Entity-first IKoanJob authoring, a ledger that is the queue, capability-graded backend (in-memory / data-backed / distributed), and scheduled reconciliation (JOBS-0005).
Model Context Protocol integration for Koan entity endpoints: discovery, schema, execution, and transports.
Human inspection console for Koan MCP: caller-visible tools, governed try-it, and fail-closed access-map diagnostics.
Governed MCP operations for Koan Jobs and Cache, with explicit enablement, exact grants, destructive confirmation, and mutation audit.
Inert Koan media contracts for immutable recipes, pipeline intent, media metadata, output shapes, and registries.
Koan media runtime for Entity-backed originals, recipe discovery, validated image pipelines, rendering, and runtime facts.
Recipe-driven HTTP rendering and Entity-backed media serving for Koan.
OpenTelemetry wiring for Koan (Reference = Intent): referencing this package enables traces + metrics + OTLP export at boot. Health and probe primitives stay in Koan.Core.
Contracts for Koan DevHost orchestration: descriptors, planner models, hosting provider and artifact exporter SPIs.
Aspire resource registration for Koan modules: auto-register distributed dependencies and align with Koan orchestration metadata.
Inert Aspire resource-contribution contract for Koan modules and backend adapters.
Koan development-host CLI: discover application services, compile plans, render Compose bundles, and execute provider workflows.
Docker provider for Koan orchestration: container metadata discovery, Compose generation hooks, and runtime probing.
Podman provider for Koan orchestration: pod lifecycle adapters, container discoverability, and Compose parity helpers.
Source generator analyzers for Koan orchestration manifests, module metadata inspection, and diagnostics.
Compose (docker-compose) exporter for Koan DevHost orchestration.
Shared Redis backend lifecycle, discovery, orchestration, and connection pooling for Koan adapters.
Inert connection-lifecycle contracts for Koan modules that share a Redis backend.

SEC-0001 fleet identity and trust fabric: the asymmetric issuer, inbound token verifier, ambient Identity, IAuthorize seam, and fail-closed trust-mode boot guard. Lower-level pillar consumed by Koan.Web.Auth (one-way dependency).
Koan storage runtime for Entity-backed objects, provider routing, segmentation, replication, validation, transfer, and lifecycle helpers.
Inert Koan storage contracts for providers, services, objects, capabilities, listing, stat, copy, presign, and model binding.
Safe local-filesystem provider for Koan Storage with seek, range, stat, listing, and same-provider copy.
S3-compatible Remote provider for Koan Storage with explicit or optional Zen Garden endpoint discovery.
`dotnet new` templates for the Koan Framework: koan-web (minimal Entity + EntityController web API) and koan-console (Entity CRUD console app), both over Sqlite and ready to run.

Local-first multi-tenancy for Koan: ambient Tenant.Use/None scope, [HostScoped] exceptions, durable context carriage, and one hard segmentation contribution compiled independently by active framework pillars.
Reference-mounted tenant registry and membership administration for Koan: a bundled operator UI and API with separated exposure/authority controls, idempotent seat grants, and mutation audit.

Koan conformance kit — your app inherits a test suite. Subclass EntityConformanceSpecs<T> (one method per entity); trait-gated batteries run round-trip, pushdown-vs-reference-oracle, paging, partition isolation, caching and embedding conformance automatically.
Koan test harness — xUnit v3 Testcontainers fixtures (KoanContainerFixture / KoanDataSpec) for engine-backed integration tests.
Koan test harness — the AddKoan() integration host (KoanIntegrationHost), xUnit-agnostic. Boot a real compiled Koan composition in your app's tests.
Controller-first ASP.NET Core projection for Koan Entities with health, startup composition, and redacted runtime facts.
Web dashboard surface for Koan Admin: prefix-aware routing, diagnostics APIs, and LaunchKit scaffolding.
Authentication core for Koan Web: IDP configuration, controller wiring, and claims transformation pipelines.
Inert Koan Web authentication contracts for provider composition, cookie lifecycle extensions, identity stores, and current-user projection.
Discord OAuth2 auth provider adapter for Koan.Web.Auth (self-registering defaults).
Google auth provider adapter for Koan.Web.Auth (self-registering defaults).
Microsoft (Entra ID) auth provider adapter for Koan.Web.Auth (self-registering defaults).
Test identity provider for Koan Web Auth: local login UI, token issuance for demos, and development-only wiring.

SEC-0006 embedded OAuth 2.1 Authorization Server for Koan: the MCP auth on-ramp. Mints asymmetric (ES256) access tokens for OAuth clients via Authorization Code + PKCE and the Device Authorization Grant, advertises itself per the MCP authorization spec, and reuses the trust fabric for issuance. Opt-in leaf (Reference = Intent).
Entity-first REST exposure plus optional moderation, audit, soft-delete, and capability-policy controllers for Koan web applications.
OpenAPI 3.1 document and governed interactive UI projection for Koan web applications.
Host-owned Entity social-card projection and automatic OpenGraph/Twitter metadata injection for Koan SPA shells.
Controller-first Server-Sent Events projection with one typed result model for Koan web applications and framework transports.
Zen Garden tools-domain runtime for Koan Framework
Inert client, discovery, connection-intent, and capability contracts for Koan Zen Garden integrations.
